news.title: STAT+: Maryland state affordability board places a price cap on Ozempic
news.summary: Nine states have been pursuing the idea of prescription drug affordability boards. Maryland's board just set limits on the price of Ozempic.

news.title: STAT+: White House taps Amazon, GoodRx, and Mark Cuban to bolster TrumpRx
news.summary: Trump's drug discount platform adds 600 generic medications via major online pharmacies.

news.title: With no approved vaccine for Ebola outbreak, experts weigh testing a long shot
news.summary: With no approved vaccine for the fast-growing Ebola outbreak in the DRC, experts weigh testing one with unknown protection.

news.title: STAT+: Trump’s CMS to allow skimpier plans on ACA exchanges
news.summary: The new plans could leave patients on the hook for more of their health care costs.

news.title: STAT+: Why the WakeMed – Atrium Health hospital merger matters
news.summary: Hospital execs worked in secret on the deal for two years.

news.title: STAT+: AstraZeneca picks up FDA approval for hypertension drug
news.summary: The China question, FDA leadership shakeups, and other biotech news from The Readout

news.title: U.S. bans entry from Ebola-affected countries as American patient is identified
news.summary: In response to an Ebola outbreak, the U.S. has banned entry for noncitizens who have been in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda, or South Sudan recently.

news.title: STAT+: Supreme Court rejects challenge to Medicare drug price negotiation
news.summary: The rejection may make the pharma firms remaining lawsuits more difficult.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about U.S. biotech’s China problem, a Regeneron flop, and much more
news.summary: The question of whether to partner with Chinese firms — or see them as rivals — is tearing biotech apart, pitting peers and partners against one another

news.title: Texas is opening up a detransition clinic
news.summary: Americans exposed to Ebola outbreak, Bill Cassidy's primary defeat, and more health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: Opinion: How to restore credibility to the CDC’s vaccine advisory committee
news.summary: Jesse Goodman, former director of CBER and former FDA chief scientist, calls for five critical changes to restore trust in the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices.

news.title: STAT+: The China question is tearing biotech apart
news.summary: China's ascent is forcing U.S. biotech companies and investors to pick a side: Is it an ally or an existential threat?

news.title: Opinion: ‘Patient autonomy’ has nothing to do with childhood vaccine policies
news.summary: Opinion: Vaccine policy it is not a matter of autonomy at all, because infants do not decline vaccination — their parents do.

news.title: STAT+: U.K. advocacy groups threaten court action over a key provision in the pharma trade deal with the U.S.
news.summary: A pair of advocacy groups is threatening legal action unless the U.K. government revokes regulations at the heart of a new pharma trade agreement with the U.S.

news.title: In Ebola outbreak, a number of Americans in the Congo believed to have had exposure to suspected cases
news.summary: A number of Americans who are in the Congo are believed to have had exposure to suspected cases in the country’s latest Ebola outbreak, sources have told STAT.

news.title: Ascension triples net income, slims operating margin to -1.1% across 9 months
news.summary: The nonprofit system's leadership described broadly improved performances across the health system’s acute care facilities and the fruit of a strategic expansion in outpatient access points.

news.title: U.S. hospital shootings have become more common over past 25 years: Mayo Clinic study
news.summary: Between 2000 and 2024, hospital-based shootings increased from six to 34 per year—or a 6.4% increase per year. And, from 2012 to 2024, incidents rose 8.4% year-over-year from 14 to 34 shootings.

news.title: Fierce Healthcare Layoff Tracker—Innovaccer lays off 340 employees; Cuts at HCA Healthcare
news.summary: Stick with this tracker for the latest layoff and workforce updates from across healthcare.

news.title: Senate HELP Chair Bill Cassidy's primary loss casts congressional health policy, leadership confirmations on new trajectory
news.summary: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy, M.D., will tackle health policy priorities and multiple leadership confirmation processes as a lame duck after drawing the ire of both President Donald Trump and the Make America Healthy Again movement.

news.title: Two-thirds of health leaders concerned about Medicare, Medicaid cuts’ impact on business operations
news.summary: If potential reimbursement cuts exceed 10%, respondents say it will have negative impacts on staffing decisions and technological investments.

news.title: Health system revenue heads increasingly turning their attention to patients' share of the bill
news.summary: The portion of survey respondents who named patient balances as their single top priority nearly doubled from 2025 to 2026, reflecting "a new financial reality" ushered by greater premiums, high-deductible plans and stricter Medicaid eligibility.

news.title: Psychedelic Therapies Are Almost Here. The Infrastructure Isn't.
news.summary: Psychedelic-assisted therapy is closer to approval than most health systems realize. Here is what the operational gap actually looks like

news.title: Turn Language Access into an Operational Advantage
news.summary: Language access affects more than compliance. It impacts throughput, readmissions, provider efficiency, patient satisfaction, and cost.

news.title: CMS pulls back limits on non-standard ACA plans in final rule
news.summary: The Trump administration has finalized annual regulations governing the Affordable Care Act's exchanges, including a plan that would pull back limits on non-standardized plan options offered by insurers.

news.title: Supply costs, payer challenges drag CommonSpirit Health to -5.8% operating margin in fiscal Q3
news.summary: Operating performance at the 137-hospital nonprofit system took a dive even before the recorded impact of a multi-billion-dollar decoupling from Tenet's revenue cycle business.

news.title: Texas Children's Hospital agrees to launch nation's first 'detransition clinic' to settle state, DOJ investigation
news.summary: The large pediatric provider had been under investigation by Texas' attorney general for three years over its gender-affirming care services. It said it agreed to the deal "to protect our resources from endless and costly litigation."

news.title: Kinderhook finalizes acquisition of home health and hospice provider Enhabit
news.summary: Kinderhook Industries finalized its previously announced take-private buyout of Enhabit, a provider of home health and hospice care.

news.title: Sanofi and Wave post AATD updates in race to end genetic disease’s 40-year new treatment drought
news.summary: Sanofi and Wave Life Sciences are using their time at the annual meeting of the American Thoracic Society in Orlando to share updated data for their next-gen attempts to treat a protein deficiency disorder that hasn’t seen significant innovation in about four decades.

news.title: BioMarin’s $270M Inozyme bet looks in trouble after rare disease drug misses key ph. 3 goal
news.summary: BioMarin’s $270 million bet on Inozyme’s enzyme replacement therapy looks in trouble after the candidate only managed to hit one of the dual primary endpoints of a phase 3 study in children with a rare genetic disorder.

news.title: After rare disease flop, cash-strapped Quince finds salvation in reverse merger
news.summary: After launching a hunt for strategic alternatives in January following a phase 3 rare disease flop, Quince Therapeutics has landed on an exit strategy. The Bay Area biotech has announced a merger with a private pulmonary startup called Orphai Therapeutics.

news.title: Nominations now open for Fierce Biotech's 2026 Fierce 15
news.summary: It's time to kick off our annual hunt for the latest crop of trailblazing biotechs that we sense are going to shape the industry of the future.

news.title: Vincentage sees 12.4% weight loss for oral GLP-1, will chase Lilly to Chinese regulators
news.summary: Vincentage Pharma’s oral GLP-1 agonist has been tied to a mean weight loss of 12.4% over a year, setting up the biotech to pursue Eli Lilly’s orforglipron to Chinese regulators.

news.title: Regeneron pens $2.3B pact with Parabilis to develop new type of ADC-like therapy
news.summary: Regeneron has ponied up $125 million in cash and an equity investment in Parabilis Medicines to join forces on a new type of antibody-drug conjugate that could have better luck binding to tricky target sites.

news.title: Boston Scientific funnels $1.5B into MiRus, with option to buy TAVR system
news.summary: Acquisitive Boston Scientific is making deals again, with a major investment play into a private medtech with an option to snap up exclusive rights to its Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement system.

news.title: Transforming neurodegenerative disease treatment
news.summary: Discover how Cognition Therapeutics is redefining hope for Alzheimer’s and Dementia with Lewy bodies with innovative, accessible therapies.

news.title: Rethinking the path to IND: How an integrated, global approach can accelerate biologics development
news.summary: Thermo Fisher’s future US-based option for biologic and sterile fill-finish manufacturing will help to alleviate capacity bottlenecks globally.

news.title: Executing biomarker-driven oncology trials
news.summary: Why biomarker-driven oncology trials require new thinking across patient recruitment, assay development and regulatory strategy.

news.title: Where the Promise of NAMs Meets Practice
news.summary: NAMs have momentum, but adoption still lags. Learn what’s holding them back and what it will take to move forward.

news.title: Ohio Discovery Corridor is Attracting the World’s Best in Pediatric Research. Here’s Why
news.summary: There are critical reasons why the industry’s brightest minds are picking Ohio to innovate, collaborate, and make the biggest impact with their work.

news.summary: 第四届中国AIGC产业峰会5月20日北京举办，干货满满开放报名。

papers.title: CiteVQA: Benchmarking Evidence Attribution for Trustworthy Document Intelligence
papers.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced document understanding, yet current Doc-VQA evaluations score only the final answer and leave the supporting evidence unchecked. This answer-only approach masks a critical failure mode: a model can land on the correct answer while grounding it in the wrong passage -- a critical risk in high-stakes domains like law, finance, and medicine, where every conclusion must be traceable to a specific source region. To address this, we introduce CiteVQA, a benchmark that requires models to return element-level bounding-box citations al
